objects.name: Carlson Software VASCO-B GNSS Receiver
objects.description: The following versions of Carlson Software VASCO-B GNSS Receiver are affected: VASCO-B GNSS Receiver <1.4.0 (CVE-2026-3893) CVSS Vendor Equipment Vulnerabilities v3 9.4 Carlson Software Carlson Software VASCO-B GNSS Receiver Missing Authentication for Critical Function Background Critical Infrastructure Sectors: Critical Manufacturing Countries/Areas Deployed: Worldwide Company Headquarters Location: United States Vulnerabilities Expand All + CVE-2026-3893 The Carlson VASCO-B GNSS Receiver lacks an authentication mechanism, allowing an attacker with network access to directly access and modify its configuration and operational functions without needing...
